text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Only now do I realize what I should've done
differently. This, too, is due to my inexperience.
choice_data_list:
Experience is key, but you did the best with
what you have now.

Learn what you can from today and win your
next race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is as you say... I may have lost, but I raced with
all I had.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will accept my shortcomings and use the
experience as fuel to overcome future challenges.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Osu! There's only one thing left to do now, and
that is to achieve victory.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And if I am to do that, I must identify where my
weaknesses lie.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'd like for today's review session to begin as soon
as possible.
